expectations.evidence: Output has title, price, and description but lacks the skill's required format: no emoji header, no '—— seller notes ——' separator, no three-price breakdown (list/floor/garage-sale). Has pricing guidance (list $220, floor $180) but no garage-sale price.
List price $220 is within the realistic $100–$400 AUD range for a 3-year-old Dyson V8 Animal with all attachments in AU.
Description includes 'Cash or bank transfer on pickup. Pickup from Melbourne. No postage — local pickup only.'
Description explicitly states 'No box — unit only with all tools.'
Agent performed live Gumtree search and produced a comp table: Southbank $240, Ferntree Gully $119, Hampton $150, Rowville $350, Glenroy $199. Pricing anchored to live data.

notes: Full rerun with WebSearch/WebFetch permissions fixed. Agent did live comps and produced a useful listing. Still fails on format_has_required_fields: uses markdown headings (##) rather than emoji header, no '—— seller notes ——' separator, and no garage-sale price. 4/5.
